basic_details.short_information: The latest Ministry of External Affairs (MEA) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Consultant in PP&R Division posts! Published on the official website, this new recruitment drive offers 2 openings for eligible candidates. Applicants within the age group of 23 to 35 years and possessing a Post Graduate degree with specialized domain knowledge in International Affairs/Public Policy, strong writing and presentation skills, and experience in reputed universities, think-tanks, or research organizations are eligible to apply online or offline. The application process will be active until 01 June

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 23 years Maximum Age: 35 years

qualification.details: Indian national Post Graduate from a recognized university in India or abroad Specialized domain knowledge/evidence of original thinking/evidence of content writing-peer-reviewed publications, journals, newspapers/media reports/experience of work in a reputed university, think-tank or research organization in the area of International Affairs/Public Policy Evidence of wide-ranging experience in writing and presentation skills

salary_details.details: Remuneration package will be commensurate with the experience and profile of the selected candidate, subject to a maximum of Rs.10 lakh per annum and deduction of applicable taxes. The amount of consultancy fee so fixed shall remain unchanged during the term of engagement.

selection_process: Review of applications Shortlisting for interview / written test Interview / Written Test
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for MEA Consultant in PP&R Division Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: mea.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
